calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by: Tony Baldwin
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mariuz Pluder is present.
Attorney Theodore Janowsky appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Oct. 21, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
